text.heading: Landing Foundation
text.subheading: Content-driven landing: roles and user stories are rendered from JSON.
text.panelText:
User stories

Problem: Employee onboarding requests arrived through email, messengers, and private chats. SLA was not tracked and some requests were lost.

Solution: We mapped the flow, introduced one intake form with request classification, and reviewed 20 random cases weekly against a checklist.

Effect: Median first-response time dropped from 18 to 5 hours, and lost requests decreased by 62% in 6 weeks.

Problem: New HR specialists screened candidates using different criteria, making team decisions inconsistent.

Solution: We introduced a competency matrix, a structured screening rubric, and twice-weekly calibration sessions.

Effect: Time to independent work for new team members dropped from 6 to 4 weeks, and repeated candidate clarifications decreased by 33%.

Problem: Candidates often declined after offer because communication between HR and hiring managers was delayed.

Solution: We set stage-level SLAs, added a bottleneck-focused kanban board, and ran a daily 15-minute sync on stalled cases.

Effect: Post-offer decline rate dropped from 21% to 13%, and average hiring cycle time became 9 days shorter.
